response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified the performance segment of '明星ギャラクティカ' (00:00-00:26) performed by Tokino Sora and Hizuki Yui. 2. Identified the composer as NayutalieN and retrieved lyrics from internal knowledge for this song. 3. Identified the rest of the video (00:26-04:59) as a talk segment without vocal music.
response.global_summary: A video featuring VTubers Tokino Sora and Hizuki Yui, who perform a dance to the song '明星ギャラクティカ' (Myousei Galactica) by NayutalieN, followed by a conversation segment where they interact.

scenes.description: Tokino Sora and Hizuki Yui perform a dance to the song '明星ギャラクティカ' (Myousei Galactica) on a brightly lit virtual stage. The song is energetic and electronic.
scenes.song_title: 明星ギャラクティカ (Myousei Galactica)
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
ギラギラと照りつける
太陽の眩しさで
わたし溶けそう
宇宙の気まぐれは
あなたとの距離もぼかすらしい
キラキラと輝いた
月の導きで夜も超えそう
あなた行きのルートは
どうやら、しばらく続くらしい

闇に紛る刹那
(わたし あなた 交代のダンシング)
ゆれだした銀色
(最高速のワープ!)
今だ銘々光れ
結構、月光のライトは明るい
凛々と生命照らす閃光
絶好のチャンス
手を叩きましょう
キュンキュン鳴るわたしの感情に
制御はきかない
太陽の様に遠きあなたへ
ただ、響いてミュージック!

フラフラと定まらない
酩酊にも似た心
気持ち
宇宙のはじまりは
あなたがくれた奇跡らしい
これが、最後なのさ
感傷に銘々浸れ
結構、月光のライトは優しい
凛々と生命照らす閃光
絶頂ロマンス
手を叩きましょう
キュンキュン鳴るわたしの感情に
終点はみえない
太陽の様に遠きあなたへ
ただ、響いてミュージック!

再三に銘々光れ
結構、月光のライトは短い
凛々と生命望む羨望
最後のダンス
手を叩いてよ
キュンキュン鳴るわたしの感情を
受けとめて
太陽の様に違うあなたに
ただ、届けてミュージック!
夜を纏え
月光ミュージック
遠くへ響け
月光ミュージック
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Glitzy
Shining
My heart seems to melt
In the sunlight
The universe's whims
Seem to blur the distance between us
Sparkling
Shining
It seems I'll overcome the night
With the guidance of the moon
The route to you
Seems it will continue for a while

Fading into the darkness
(Me, You, Alternating dancing)
Silver light begins to shake
(Warping at maximum speed!)
Shine brightly, name by name now
The moonlight is quite bright
Radiating life, a flash of light
Perfect opportunity, let's clap our hands
With my heart chiming 'kyun-kyun'
I cannot control it
Towards you who are as distant as the sun
Just, let the music resound!

Flickering, unstable
A heart akin to intoxication
Feelings
The beginning of the universe
Seems to be a miracle you gave me
This, is it the end?
Soak in sentiment, name by name now
The moonlight is quite gentle
Radiating life, a flash of light
Ultimate romance, let's clap our hands
With my heart chiming 'kyun-kyun'
There is no end in sight
Towards you who are as distant as the sun
Just, let the music resound!

Shine brightly, name by name again
The moonlight is quite short
Radiating life, desiring an aspiration
The final dance, let's clap our hands
With my heart chiming 'kyun-kyun'
Accept it
Towards you who are different as the sun
Just, deliver the music!
Wrap yourself in the night
Moonlight music
Resound to far away
Moonlight music

scenes.description: The performers interact with each other and the audience on stage. No vocal music is playing.
